page.content: The analysis of meteorological variables revealed several significant correlations, with Maximum temperature P1 showing a correlation coefficient of -0.200 and a P. value of 0.029, while Minimum temperature P1 had a coefficient of 0.223 and a P. value of 0.015. Mean temperature P1 exhibited a correlation coefficient of 0.037 with a P. value of 0.689, and Rainfall P1 showed a correlation coefficient of 0.214 and a P. value of 0.020. Relative humidity at 6 am P1 had a coefficient of -0.045 with a P. value of 0.628, whereas Relative humidity at 12 am P1 had a coefficient of 0.191 and a P.
